scripts.size: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),zlib=require('zlib');const buf=fs.readFileSync('dist/assets/index.js');zlib.gzip(buf,(e,b)=>{const kb=b.length/1024;console.log('Bundle size:',kb.toFixed(1),'KB gzipped');if(kb>50){console.error('FAIL: bundle exceeds 50KB');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('PASS: under 50KB limit')}});"
